emails.subject: ISDA(s) with Mitsui Corp.
emails.body: Tana, would you be able to check on Mitsui Corp. ISDAs for us? Thanks. If I can access the database please let me know. Laurie Forwarded by Laurie Mayer/HOU/ECT on 05/30/2001 08:24 AM Jane McBride@ENRON 05/29/2001 08:56 PM

emails.subject: Re: ISDA(s) with Mitsui Corp.
emails.body: Re: ISDA(s) with Mitsui Corp. No ISDA for Mitsui Corp. Below is the link which should enable you view access to the Financial Trading Agreement Database. You can forward this email with the link to any member of your team and they will then have the link which will get them access to the database. Link Laurie Mayer 05/30/2001 08:26 AM
